message:
feat: add init and entrypoint support for devcontainer features

Add support for init and entrypoint container properties from feature metadata.
Features can now specify init=true to enable Docker's init system and provide
custom entrypoint scripts.

Implementation:
- Added --init flag when metadata.Init is true
- Added --entrypoint flag with joined array when metadata.Entrypoint is present
- Flags added in ApplyFeatureProperties around line 90-98

Test Coverage:
- Added TestApplyFeatureInitAndEntrypoint to verify flags are added correctly
- Test verifies both --init and --entrypoint=/custom.sh flags

TDD Process:
- RED: Test failed with missing flags
- GREEN: Implementation added, test passes
